name: Hexavale
description: Create worlds and reach the top of the highscore.
bulletPoints: Procedural tile generation with draw-call efficiency.
Steam integration for achievements and leaderboards.
Full stack development of game systems and mechanics.

name: Desert Flower
description: Create worlds and reach the top of the highscore.
bulletPoints: Performance optimization for procedural plants of 30%.
Custom editor tools for level design and world building.
Full stack development from prototype features to final game systems.
Balanced level, ability and plant design.

name: Karma and Jonar - The Rock Trolls
description: Online Co-op adventure based on the book series "Karma & Jonar".
bulletPoints: Engineered a prototype architecture for online-multiplayer coop.
Command Pattern system for designer-friendly, decoupled event handling.
Custom Dialogue System and dynamic sequencer cinematics.
Optimization: Using Nanite to optimize game performance with movie-ready assets

name: Magical Harvest
description: Farming game with magic, seasons and romance. Transitioned to Unreal Engine from a 2-year development in Unity.
bulletPoints: Gameplay Systems: Developed inventory, decoration, farming, magic, and character customization systems.
World Building: Built a time-of-day and seasonal system and optimized asset management.
AI and Tools: Created NPC/Animal AI and custom Unreal Editor tools to improve productivity.
